name: Hide+Seek: The Mod [beta]
author: nzh0172
description:
Play hide and seek using your own rail network inspired by Jet Lag The Game's infamous Hide and Seek game as the seeker.

Phases

  1. Setup phase: Decide your playing area, number of rounds played, hiding time, game mode and starting station
  2. Seeking phase: Use questions and question log to pinpoint the hider's location.
  3. Reveal phase: See the hiding station and the path it took.

Game mode

Instant (quick-play)

  • Hider path is schedule-valid on a synthetic timetable (not live trains).
  • No hide timer; seeking starts immediately after the hiding station is chosen.
  • Long travel budget for path search (up to 24 hours of journey time).
  • Trains do not need to be running.

Live

  • Hider must travel on real running trains and real departures.
  • Requires trains to run on your routes.
  • Simulation runs for X hours which can be set on Setup Phase then seeking begins.
  • Hiding destinations must be reachable within that time window.

How the hider pick a station

Among valid candidates, the bot prefers a distance band from the play-area center (as a fraction of radius):

ZoneDistance from centerWeight
Near12%–42% of radius40%
Far42%–72% of radius40%
Boundary≥ 88% of radius (outer ring)20%

It rolls a zone with those weights, picks a uniform random candidate in that zone, then falls back through near → far → boundary if the preferred zone is empty. If still empty, it prefers non-boundary candidates, then any remaining candidate.
